review_title: LiveFlow Best and seamless all accounting solutions!
description: As an accountant, Live Flow has made my work very simple with the generation of timely and very efficient reports. It is easy to analyse the accounts and make relevant corrections. With Liveflow, I do not take plenty of time navigating as it is simple to use and understand.
author: PETTIE N.
pros: LiveFlow is very efficient, easy to use, and user-friendly, and easily integrates with Google Sheets and Excel. It saves a lot of time in the generation of cumbersome client reports and is very efficient as the company expands.
cons: LiveFlow is very efficient and seamless and nothing not to like!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Fantastic product and, for the few times I've needed it, very responsive customer service. Would highly recommend.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Liveflow is a fantastic addition to bookkeeping and accounting workflow. Yes, it is expensive, even more expensive than QBO itself. HOWEVER, it pays for itself in both productivity and accuracy. Manual data entry is reduced and typos and “fat fingering” are eliminated. If QBO is correct, then your custom-created reports are correct. It does take some time to get the most out of it – but once set up it works great. You can pull raw data from QBO and then use it to create various dashboards and reports. And you can also use it to pull full financial statements and then create dashboards that pull right from there. Great product. And the few times I’ve needed customer service, they’re quite responsive. Highly recommended.
cons: It's a bit expensive. The price was a shocker but that's because we signed up when they were new. Multiples companies don't seem to provide any discount so we only use it with one entity.

author: Jaylyn N.
pros: I like the functionality of sharing with teammates and the ease of sharing. The software is still very new to my organization and we are still learning
cons: it feels like it was built with mostly the finance team in mind which I would like for it to be a bit easier for non-finance team members
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Liveflow has been a game-changer for us because we send out many reports every month, often in a short time span. Many of our reports are consolidating multi-entity organizations. After the initial setup is complete, our clients can access their report at any time to view up-to-date financial data—no need to request or wait for a newly generated report.
author: Natalie T.
pros: Liveflow saves a significant amount of time sending out financial reports. It's really great if you're working with several organizations. One of the most useful things for me is consolidating multi-entity organizations.
cons: The initial setup took some time, but I think that's true with any software. I'm specifically referring to mapping the chart of accounts in multi-entity organizations. Single-entity organizations has a much faster setup.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: LifeFlow has completely transformed the way our team operates. As a firm that specializes in accounting and advisory services for restaurants, we needed a solution that would reduce manual work and help us focus on delivering real value to our clients. LifeFlow delivered — and then some. What used to take hours of spreadsheet cleanup and manual reporting now happens in minutes. The platform seamlessly connects our data sources and automates reporting workflows, which has saved us countless hours every month. The time savings have enabled our team to shift focus from data entry to data interpretation. We're now spending our time providing clients with insights that actually help them run better businesses — not just sending them reports. If your firm is still stuck exporting and formatting data manually, you need LiveFlow. It’s intuitive, powerful, and lets your team spend their time on what really matters.
author: Liz S.
pros: Ease of use, stellar personalized customer service and the company's abbility to identify pain points and develop innovative solutions.+
cons: The initial setup of templates can be time consuming, but well worth the time investment.

review_title: LiveFlow is a great too for extracting reports from QBO
description: Overall, LiveFlow is a great tool for finance people who need to extract data quickly from QBO on a regular basis.
author: Matt K.
pros: LiveFlow makes it really to easy to extract information from QBO. It has allowed the team to automate reporting, which saves us a lot of time every month.
cons: There are not a lot of high-quality dashboards. The dashboards either lack a modern look/feel or they are too specialized for specific industries, which make them not useful for us.

review_title: LiveFlow is crucial for outsourced accountants!
author: Olivia R.
pros: LiveFlow has saved my team tons of time with each monthly close! As an accounting firm user, being able to pull reports on a regular cadence across clients without having to log in, configure, download, and upload into a workbook is huge.
cons: Nothing--any issue I have had has been quickly resolved by the team as soon as I brought an error or suggestion to their attention!

description: Overall solid. It gives us a new tool to deliver better service to our clients. It's easy to implement makes it seamless with Google Sheets.
author: James M.
pros: LiveFlow lets us build reports for our clients that get them real time data. Instead of waiting 10-15 days for month end reports, we now build flash reports that they can look at daily with up to date info. LiveFlow also removes friction in the reporting process which is always a win.
cons: At first the cost could seem high since you may not be used to paying for a reporting tool. But once it is in your process, it's difficult to think about not using it.

description: LiveFlow has helped us empower our program teams to view and manage their own budgets *without needing to give them access to our accounting software* in a way that we had never been able to before.
author: Fernando G.
pros: Fast, seamless integration with our Google Sheets budget spreadsheets. The user interface is intuitive, making it easy to onboard new team members.
cons: Some cells are not supported by the drill down feature, and it's not immediately apparent which ones are and which ones are not. This has sometimes led to confusion among our team members.

review_title: LiveFlow has been a total game-changer for our CFO reporting
description: As an accounting firm, we use it to build out real time, easy to understand dashboards for our clients, especially in the construction space. The way it pulls live data from QuickBooks into excel has saved us a ton of time and made our reports way more dynamic and insightful. Our clients love the clean look and how quickly we can turn around answers, and we love how easy it is to use. It’s become a core part of how we deliver our CFO services.
author: Caitlin B.
pros: It was really easy to setup and get all of our clients onboard. I love the customization options the best because it really allows us to tailor to our needs.
cons: There wasn't anything I didn't like. It was easy to use and get going, so I don't have any complaints

description: Our company has been using LiveFlow flow for about two years and it's become an important tool in our month-end process, allowing us to extract the financial data necessary and then analyze and compare for leadership review and oversight.
author: Danielle B.
pros: The support service provided by LiveFlow is outstanding! When we have had any questions or concerns, LiveFlow support has been incredibly prompt and direct. There are not intermediate steps needed to receive help or support.
cons: The auto-refresh parameters are a bit confusing as it allows overall auto-refresh to be disabled, but still retains a toggle option for separate reports to be enabled for auto-refresh.

description: My overall experience with LiveFlow has been very positive. My clients love it, the onboarding is easy, the connection to QuickBooks is fast and accurate, and the flexibility is amazing.
author: Colin V.
pros: It integrates real-time data from QuickBooks into LiveFlow and allows you to customize your reports to be exactly what you want.
cons: The custom reporting set up can be time-consuming for each new client.

description: Liveflow makes our lives so much easier with reporting and reconciliations.
author: Kenneth J.
pros: I like liveflow since it allows us accountants to do our tasks such as reconciliations, matching of accounts and transactions, and accounting analysis, real-time. The features that allow us to add reports, manage reports, and refresh them as soon as we make changes in Quickbooks is a real game changer!
cons: I do not have any real issues when it comes to liveflow. Maybe if we can have any formatting that we can apply to the reports, that would be helpful!

review_title: A Game-Changer for Financial Reporting, With Room for Smoother Onboarding
author: Jaymin D.
pros: LiveFlow's real-time integration with Google Sheets is incredibly powerful. I loved how seamlessly it pulls live data from accounting platforms like QuickBooks, saving hours of manual updates and reducing errors. The automation of financial reporting was especially impressive — it made complex workflows simple and efficient.
cons: While LiveFlow is powerful, I found the initial setup and configuration slightly complex, especially for users who aren’t very familiar with Google Sheets formulas or automation tools. Additionally, some advanced customization features could be more user-friendly or better documented

review_title: LiveFlow has saved me (and my Firm) hundreds of hours!
description: LiveFlow is super easy to set up, reporting and dashboards are slick and customizable. Their customer services is super helpful!
author: Kristen U.
pros: LiveFlows ability to consolidate multiple QBO accounts is unmatched!
cons: The set up can take some time but well worth it!

review_title: I wish we discover this system earlier - Love it
description: I'm in the early stages and started with simple reports to show how our financials are created using LiveFlow. We're also planning to add visual dashboards soon.
author: Joanna Z.
pros: This is a great program that has helped us tremendously in automating many program reports, as well as our monthly financials. We've used other systems before, but nothing compares to LiveFlow. It's so easy and intuitive that working with it feels more like fun than work.
cons: I truly have nothing to report for not liking, as I love it. We are planning to use it for visuals and cash flow reporting.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I enjoy working with LiveFlow and adding my comments making it easy for my team members to follow and reconcile accounts
author: Habiba S.
pros: I like creating month close reconciliations via QBO
cons: It is not working perfectly for syncing it to xero

description: LiveFlow really helped me cut down on manual work. Instead of exporting reports from QuickBooks and copying them into spreadsheets, the data just synced straight into Google Sheets. The real-time auto-refresh meant I didn’t have to constantly update things—everything stayed current automatically.
author: Maverick M.
pros: Ease of use, very easy to create visuals for others to see.
cons: Steep learning curve: I find that it takes time to get familiar with how to set up and link LiveFlow to Google Sheets, especially since i was not already comfortable with spreadsheet formulas or API integrations.

description: LiveFlow has been a massive time-saver for our finance team. It's taken reporting from a manual, error-prone process to something that's live, reliable, and easy to work with. The ability to build custom dashboards and run flexible forecasts has helped us move faster and make better decisions. Even with a few small areas for improvement, it's one of the best tools we've added to our stack.
author: Roland G.
pros: The live connection to Xero and Google Sheets is a game-changer — no more manual exports or stale data. I also love the built-in forecasting features, especially how easily you can model both fixed and variable costs. It makes reporting, scenario planning, and board prep so much faster and more accurate.
cons: I wish there was a built-in cash flow statement template. Right now, you have to build it manually from the data, which takes a bit of extra setup time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Must Have Tool for Financial Analysis and Reporting
description: I use LF almost every day. Gone are the days where I am going into my financials and exporting to excel and manually manipulating data just so I can start analyzing. Now I can refresh my LiveFlow file and jump right in!
author: Clara F.
pros: Easy to use / User Friendly Live refreshes to QBO Lives in Excel and Google Sheet
cons: No cons! I am excited to see how the product evolves in the future!

description: It has been great! Like I said, the support function from them has been great to have.
author: Austin B.
pros: The integration makes updating and modeling key financial data a breeze. The support of LiveFlows staff is also great!
cons: Not a fan of the drill down function in excel that wants to pop up a new web browser tab each time
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jory D.
pros: LiveFlow eliminates manual spreadsheet updates by syncing real-time data from QuickBooks into Google Sheets. This saves hours each month, reduces errors, and gives us faster, cleaner financial reporting. We use it to automate monthly close, consolidate multi-entity financials, and build dashboards that update automatically.
cons: The UX could be a bit more modern. I also wish the reports were a bit more customizable. Not much to dislike about a tool that saves me hours every month.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall, I'd highly recommend this to anyone trying to streamline processes.
author: Rodino B.
pros: The biggest pro in my opinion is the ability to bring in QBO date at the click of a button. This saves a tremendous amount of time from having to go into QBO and pull an updated reports.
cons: Sometimes there can be sync errors/issues with the API. Doesn't happen often.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Joah T.
pros: Super convenient—it's easy to drop the report into your workpapers, and you can even update it in real time.
cons: In my recent experience, there were times when reports took a while to generate, but the good thing is, when we reported it to their customer service, they were able to fix it right away.

description: LiveFlow has saved my team ample time generally dedicated to pulling months' reports. Now, they live in one place and are auto-updated. Genius!!
author: Faith B.
pros: The real-time reporting from one link/report.
cons: I have not run into anything that I would consider a con.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
